data.title: Chewy CEO Sees Resilient Pet Industry, Expanding Profitability In 2026
data.description: Chewy Inc. (CHWY) announced its fourth-quarter 2025 adjusted earnings at 27 cents per share, surpassing the consensus of 20 cents and falling within the management's projected range of 24-27 cents. The pet supplies retailer disclosed sales of $3.265 billion, marking a 0.5% increase year over year (or +8.1% on a normalized 13-week basis), with the consensus estimating $3.262 billion and management guidance ranging from $3.24-$3.26 billion. Chewy CEO Sumit Singh expressed confidence in the company's ability to sustain profitable growth, expand margins, and generate strong cash flow in the coming years. Autoship customer sales rose by 4.8% to $2.74 billion, underscoring the stability of the Autoship program, where customers can schedule regular pet food shipments.

data.title: Chewy Stock Surges On Strong Q4 Results And Guidance
data.description: Chewy Inc (NYSE: CHWY) stock is on the rise after exceeding expectations in their fourth-quarter results and providing a promising fiscal outlook for 2026. Analysts, including JPMorgan's Doug Anmuth, have upgraded their ratings due to the company's strong performance. Chewy reported Q4 revenue of $3.265 billion, an 8% year-over-year growth when adjusted for a prior year's longer quarter. This figure surpassed both management's guidance and Wall Street predictions. Additionally, the company saw improved profitability with adjusted EBITDA reaching $162 million. The stock's remarkable strength is attributed to these positive results and future prospects.

data.title: CrowdStrike Expands Strategic Collaboration With Intel to Secure the Next Generation of AI PCs
data.description: In Austin, Texas and San Francisco, a recent press release stated that CrowdStrike (NASDAQ: CRWD) revealed an enhanced partnership with Intel at RSA 2026. This collaboration aims to enhance the efficiency of the CrowdStrike Falcon® platform for Intel-powered AI PCs. The initiative allows businesses to identify threats quicker and secure confidential information as AI tasks transfer to the endpoint device. AI PCs are changing the landscape of work by having AI assistants analyze crucial data directly on the device. This shift is broadening the potential for cyberattacks and introducing fresh security vulnerabilities.

data.title: SUMMER 2026 HEATS UP WITH THE FIRST-EVER ALAN JACKSON'S 5 O'CLOCK SOMEWHERE FEST
data.description: An exclusive event combining top-tier music, seaside lifestyle, and top-notch service will feature performances by Ella Langley, Old Dominion, Jimmy Buffett's Coral Reefer Band, and others! The inaugural event is scheduled for June 12-13 in West Palm Beach, Florida. Interested individuals can sign up for presale access starting today.

data.title: CNCF Backstage Documentary Highlights Project Evolution from Development to Global Open Source Standard for Platform Engineering
data.description: A new documentary titled "Backstage: From Spreadsheet to Standard" has been launched by the Cloud Native Computing Foundation (CNCF). The film showcases the development and expansion of the Backstage project, emphasizing its significance in advancing platform engineering efforts. The documentary delves into how Backstage has played a role in accelerating platform engineering initiatives.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq, Dow Gains Trimmed; AI, Chip Firms Run As Tapestry Creates New Entry (Live Coverage)
data.description: The Dow Jones index showed growth on Wednesday following President Donald Trump's proposal of a peace plan to Iran. However, there was a decline in oil prices. Nasdaq and Dow saw some gains but these were reduced. Artificial intelligence and chip companies showed strong performance, while Tapestry made a notable entrance into the market. This update was provided by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Britten Inc. Announces Strategic Shift to World-Class Event Fabrication
data.description: A company based in Traverse City, Michigan made a significant announcement on March 25, 2026. Britten Inc., known for its expertise in signage, large-format printing, and visual communications, revealed a new strategic direction. The firm will now prioritize world-class event fabrication as its main focus, while still maintaining signage as a fundamental aspect of its operations. This shift represents a change in the company's traditional business model towards a more specialized area. Britten Inc.'s decision is expected to impact its operations significantly, and marks a strategic evolution in its services.

data.title: EDB Highlights Community Release of CloudNativePG 1.29 and Previews Exclusive Kubernetes Data Protection at KubeCon Europe
data.description: Cutting-edge developments are enabling businesses to decrease their reliance on hyperscalers and establish a portable, cloud-agnostic framework for successful AI operations. In a recent announcement on March 25, 2026, EnterpriseDB (EDB), a prominent player in the field of sovereign AI and data, emphasized the launch of a new community release. This release is poised to revolutionize the industry by offering organizations more independence and flexibility.

data.title: NVIDIA MIG improves AI ROI by 33% with 1.00 req/s per GPU using Multi-Instance GPU partitioning vs. 0.76 with time-slicing. More details available.
data.description: Fresh performance data from NVIDIA demonstrates that Multi-Instance GPU partitioning has reached an impressive rate of 1.00 requests per second (req/s) per GPU. In comparison, traditional time-slicing methods only achieved 0.76 req/s in production artificial intelligence (AI) workloads. This highlights the significant impact of Multi-Instance GPU partitioning in optimizing GPU performance for AI tasks.

data.title: Nutrishop Franchise Thrives on Human Connection in AI-Driven Era
data.description: With automation on the rise, Nutrishop predicts that genuine support, connections, compassion, and community will be essential for the success of physical stores. The company stated this in Henderson, Nevada on March 25, 2026. The global wellness industry is expected to reach nearly $10 trillion by 2029, with artificial intelligence playing a significant role.

data.title: The Zeigler Kalamazoo Marathon Returns April 25-26, 2026, Bringing Family-Friendly Fun For Everyone
data.description: The Zeigler Kalamazoo Marathon is in need of volunteers for various roles as it gears up for its upcoming event. A price hike is looming, set to come into force on April 1, 2026. The marathon, scheduled for Saturday, April 25 through Sunday, in KALAMAZOO, Michigan, is set to attract a large number of participants and supporters.

data.title: American Board of Emergency Medicine Launches Inaugural Certifying Exam
data.description: Ensuring high standards for emergency physicians, the American Board of Emergency Medicine (ABEM) recently conducted its first Certifying Examination in East Lansing, Michigan on March 25, 2026. More than 300 candidates participated in this milestone assessment, marking a significant achievement in maintaining excellence in emergency medicine.

data.title: Cancer Drug Developer Nanobiotix Denies Any Active Takeover Process
data.description: Nanobiotix S.A. (NASDAQ: NBTX) saw an increase in shares following speculation about acquisition interest, as indicated by reports from media outlet La Lettre mentioning potential interest from Johnson & Johnson (NYSE: JNJ). However, the company clarified that there are no current takeover discussions or evaluations in progress, aiming to stabilize investor sentiment amid broader market gains. Nanobiotix issued a statement debunking factual inaccuracies in media reports and affirming its commitment to its biotechnological therapeutic innovations. The company emphasized its focus on existing strategies, denying any intentions for control changes. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

Head of the International Energy Agency Fatih Birol says he is "ready to move forward" with an additional release of oil reserves "if and when necessary" amid the current global energy crisis triggered by the Iran conflict.

data.title: Visa joins Canton Network as Super Validator, enabling banks to facilitate stablecoin payments & settlement.
data.description: Visa is collaborating with banks to enable the processing of stablecoin transactions and settlements through blockchain technology. This initiative aims to maintain privacy on the institutional blockchain network by leveraging Visa's infrastructure. The partnership will facilitate seamless transactions and settlement processes, benefiting both financial institutions and consumers.

data.title: Atlanta Facial Plastic Surgeon Dr. Benjamin Stong Highlights Advanced Deep Plane Facelift Technique That Enhances Natural Cheekbone Definition
data.description: Dr. Benjamin Stong, a facial plastic surgeon in Atlanta, showcased a cutting-edge deep plane facelift method that enhances SMAS repositioning and accentuates cheekbones naturally by utilizing vertical midface elevation and providing structural facial support. The event took place in Atlanta on March 25, 2026, unveiling this innovative technique to the public.

data.title: Neon Sets Strong Financial Foundation for Future Growth
data.description: A technology company in New York, Neon, has recently disclosed receiving more than $25 million in funding from a combination of equity and credit sources, including Lightspeed Venture Partners, Upper90, and Upfront Ventures. This influx of capital raises Neon's total funding to close to $27 million, after a previous pre-seed round securing $1.5 million with Upfront Ventures, Wilson Sonsini, and Xfund as lead investors. Neon aims to empower individuals to monetize their personal data amidst growing concerns about data privacy and usage in the digital age.
